principles: Templates guide style, not item counts.
Sparse content should be centred and balanced.
Excess content should become accessible through adaptive overflow patterns.

testimonials.rule: Never discard reviews. Additional reviews become carousel slides.

rules: Do not display giant walls of images.
Do not show file-name captions by default.
Avoid reusing the same image in multiple prominent sections when alternatives exist.
If an image is already used as hero, prefer different images for gallery cards.

faqs.rule: FAQs must remain accessible even if not fully visible on the main page.

location.rule: If directions or map data exist, render a location section or make it available through a contact/location drawer.

virtualTour.rule: Virtual tour embeds should not be reduced to a footer link only.

contact.previewMode: Submitting should show a preview-only message unless the site is live.

navigation.rule: Only show nav items for sections that exist.
navigation.requiredBehaviour: Every nav item must anchor to the rendered section in the current preview document.
navigation.missingSectionBehaviour: Hide nav item or map it to the closest valid section.

devicePreview.rule: Do not shrink a desktop layout into a phone frame. Render the site at the target viewport width.

bookingAndForms.previewMode: Show a preview message instead of submitting.
bookingAndForms.liveMode: Submit into the customer dashboard, booking system, CRM, or configured integration.
bookingAndForms.rule: CTA buttons must either anchor, open a modal, or submit to a known live destination.
